verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I came trapped in this body By-passed my theophany But I'm longing to get out of this house To that body prepared for me Where sickness, pain and death Will all be history A supernatural Word That's what is changing me

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: From glory unto glory I'm being changed Soon we'll lay aside this flesh To enter eternal rest I'm being changed I'm being changed I'm being changed Putting on my theophany

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I'm so tired of these dimensions They're holding me earth-bound down in time I want to go to Mt. Zion Where peace will all be mine I can see the saints running over those hills Just to greet me We'll sing amazing grace With the prophet under the evergreen tree

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Make sure everything is intact For soon he'll be coming back I'm being changed putting on my theophany Get your tickets in your hand To join that big great heavenly clan I'm being changed putting on my theophany

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: We'll sing in one accord As he says welcome all aboard I'm being changed putting on my theophany Don't be late, don't hesitate For He'll be waiting at the eastern gate I'm being changed putting on my theophany
